violations.text: Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Bread buns were observed with rodent gnaw marks and droppings. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front door ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnaw marks and droppings throughout establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (cup holders ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The following physical facilities is in poor repair: 1.ceilings have small holes near electrical poles. 2.floors near mop sink area are damaged. 3.wall(piece of covering)is detaching from wall in storage room.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The floors throughout the facility (including walk in cooler and front counter drink station) have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rdoent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Inspector observed bread buns with rodent droppings and gnawed marks.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

(Ham) was observed held at (66) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings and gnawed food product). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
(Various food product) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in freezer ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The following non food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.food carts 2.equipment storage bins 3.food prep table shelves 4.buckets lids 5.equipment covers/lids New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Inspector observed floor drains and floors with pooled water throughout establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024
Handsink observed not clean to sight nor touch. Soil residue and other debris observed in and around handsink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (produce/tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024
Rodent droppings observed in mechanical/storage room. Area to be cleaned, monitored and maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

A bag of onions were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated bag of onions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the hot-hold units, filtration systems and soda fountain lines have a heavy accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The wall near mechanical box is in poor repair. Exposed insulation observed. Wall to be sealed/covered to prevent entry of pests and harboring conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility and electrical panel near whopper grill have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
